programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal show which setup, swing, and equipment adjustments translate into stopping slices and hooks. Martin shares some of his favorite drills on finding the proper grip, maintaining balance, and swinging on the proper plane.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach the best wedge tips for around the green. Learn how to setup for success, use tees to improve contact, and how to control distance like Dustin Johnson with the use of a clock.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach the shots needed for success in The Masters; Martin shares a driving tip he learned playing golf with Dustin Johnson and a distance drill used by Jack Nicklaus; a top college player gives a guest lesson.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall explains how to become a better putter ASAP; those four letters standing for aim, stability, arc, and pace. Martin shares drills for each letter from putting gurus including Dave Stockton, Phil Kenyon, and the late Frank Thomas.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: 18-time Major Champion Jack Nicklaus speaks with Martin Hall about being coached at an early age by Jack Grout, his number one swing fundamental, and how to maximize distance with the driver. Favorite drills inspired by The Golden Bear.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Contestants are surprised to discover they must play their way onto the show, and one is sent home before her suitcase is unpacked.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: No time is wasted before contestants are pitted against one another in a match play competition to see who will be safe from elimination.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Contestants pick a shot that could lead to immunity or, ultimately, send them home with nothing.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Teammates rely on each other for points but, ultimately, face each other to see who will survive.

programme.title: Build a Better Game

programme.desc: Golf has never been more of a power game than it is right now. Shortening the golf course off the tee has a bigger impact on lowering scores than ever before. And it's not just a strategy for disruptor-pros like Bryson DeChambeau.

programme.title: Breaking into the Game: Beginners
programme.desc: Shot at The Club at Ibis, Martin Hall's new series is the definitive video golf instruction piece for beginners, providing a solid foundation for new golfers of any age.

programme.title: Golf's Greatest Holes

programme.title: Golf's Greatest Holes
programme.desc: Paul and Chris play the sixth hole, a dogleg par 4, at a hilltop course in Lisbon, Portugal, at Penha Longa in the Cascais area.

programme.title: Golf's Greatest Holes
programme.desc: Paul and Chris play the 14th hole in Aroeira near Lisbon, Portugal, a course that Paul knows well from playing the Portuguese Open.
